mapper.select: SELECT id, country AS 'country', channel AS 'channel', hot_type AS 'hotType', hot_level AS 'hotLevel', video_type AS 'videoType', view_target AS 'viewTarget', iactr_target AS 'iactrTarget', clickr_target AS 'clickrTarget', conver_target AS 'converTarget', cpm_target AS 'cpmTarget', roas_target AS 'roasTarget' FROM `a_hot_target` WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE `a_hot_target` SET `country` = #{country}, `channel` = #{channel}, `hot_type` = #{hotType}, `hot_level` = #{hotLevel}, `video_type` = #{videoType}, `view_target` = #{viewTarget}, `iactr_target` = #{iactrTarget}, `clickr_target` = #{clickrTarget}, `conver_target` = #{converTarget}, `cpm_target` = #{cpmTarget}, `roas_target` = #{roasTarget}, `update_user` = #{updateUser}, `update_time` = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
